Дял на предприятията с 10 и повече заети: Share of enterprises with 10 or more persons employed using at least one artificial-intelligence technology
Проблемът не е само в изкуствения интеле: The problem is not artificial intelligence alone
През 2025 г. изкуствен интелект използва: In 2025, :bg% of Bulgarian enterprises with 10 or more persons employed used AI, against an EU average of :eu%. But the gap in cloud services — the foundation working AI is built on — is wider still: :cbg% against :ceu%.
Между 2023 и 2025 г. използването на обл: Between 2023 and 2025 cloud adoption in Bulgaria stood still while the EU added more than seven points. For comparison, :dbg% of Bulgarian and :deu% of European enterprises reached at least a basic level of digital intensity in 2024.
Националното проучване на Съвета ще пока: The Council’s national survey will show what sits behind these figures — which processes, which barriers and which sectors.
Дял на предприятията с 10 и повече заети: Share of enterprises with 10 or more persons employed buying cloud computing services
Източник: Евростат, :ai и :cloud — предп: Source: Eurostat, :ai and :cloud — enterprises with 10+ persons employed, excluding agriculture, mining and the financial sector. From 2025 the AI indicator covers eight technologies instead of seven.
